abstract: NPPP-1 is a certified reference material consisting of a dispersion of nanoscale polypropylene particles in pH 8 water. It is intended for assessing biologic effects of nanoscale plastics, calibrating procedures, and developing methods for determining the size and charge of nanoscale materials. Each vial contains a minimum of 5 mL of dispersion.

key_metrics_output: assessing the biologic effects of nanoscale plastics
developing methods for determining the size and charge of nanoscale materials
abstract: NPPP-1 Reference Material (RM) is a dispersion of nanoscale polypropylene (PP) in water
It is intended for use in assessing the biologic effects of nanoscale plastics, calibrating procedures, and developing methods for determining the size and charge of nanoscale materials
A single vial contains minimum 5 mL of nanoscale PP dispersion in pH 8 water
